command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 bash -s << 'ENDSSH'
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai
echo '=REPO='
pwd
git remote -v
echo '=BRANCH='
git branch -a
echo '=HEAD='
git log --oneline -5
echo '=STATUS='
git status --short
echo '=STASH='
git stash list
echo '=TAGS='
git tag --sort=-creatordate | head -15
echo '=SERVICES='
systemctl --user list-units --type=service --state=running 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo '=PYTHON_PROCS='
ps aux | grep python | grep -v grep | head -10
ENDSSH
